description: Ablation study on number of islands in distributed evolutionary algorithm

results.notes: Single island - no migration, slower convergence, lower final score
Four islands - good balance of exploration and exploitation
Eight islands (default) - best performance, maintains diversity

conclusion: More islands improve final score and convergence speed. 8 islands (default) provides best performance with good diversity maintenance. Single island suffers from premature convergence.

statistical_significance.recommendation: 8 islands is optimal; diminishing returns beyond 8
